TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Qnazi’, title = Qnazi’, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Qnazi’} }

S.FORM: yalaw gi siy 'nxal mbhuyaw qu kinbahan naha' ru, rima' mshzi' kruma' squliq naha' mwah mqumah sa pzyux iyal qqhuniq ka qnazi' ru nanu' yasa qu sawn naha' maha Mqnazi' la.
yalaw gi siy 'nxal mbhuyaw qu kinbahan naha' ru, rima' mshzi' kruma' squliq naha' mwah mqumah sa pzyux iyal qqhuniq ka qnazi' ru nanu' yasa qu sawn naha' maha Mqnazi' la.
S.PHON: jalaw ɣi s~ɕij ʔnxal mβħujaw qu kinβaħan naħaʔ ru, rimaʔ ms~ɕħziʔ krumaʔ s~ɕquliq naħaʔ mwaħ mqumaħ s~ɕa pzjux ijal qqħuniq ka qnaziʔ ru nanuʔ jas~ɕa qu s~ɕawn naħaʔ maħa mqnaziʔ la.
